subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Book proclaimeth: This Day is the Day of God, and infinite bounties flow forth from the cloud of mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب اعظم میفرماید یوم یوم الله است و فیوضات لایتناهی الهی از ابر رحمت جاری و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
